//: Per-machine WebAssembly build config. Copy this file to deps.local.json (git-ignored) and edit the paths for THIS machine. Then build with: npm run build (no environment variables needed).
//wasmThreadsDepsDir: Install prefix of a VTK wasm built with VTK_WEBASSEMBLY_THREADS=ON. Used by the DEFAULT (threaded) build, so required unless you only do F3D_WASM_THREADS=OFF builds.
//wasmDepsDir: Install prefix of a plain (non-threaded) VTK wasm build. Only used by the opt-out single-threaded build (F3D_WASM_THREADS=OFF). Optional.
//emsdkDir: Emscripten SDK root (the folder with emsdk_env.bat). The build auto-activates it; omit if emsdk is already on PATH. Optional.
//ninjaDir: Folder containing ninja(.exe). Prepended to PATH for the build; omit if Ninja is already on PATH. Optional.
//fullPlugins: Set true to build the full plugin set (needs WASM Assimp/Draco/OCCT/web-ifc/WebP in wasmDepsDir). Optional, default false.
